---
title: "Analytics Dashboard"
format: html
---

## Live Data Analytics

As part of my training in BigQuery and Looker Studio, I have learned to build interactive, live-updating dashboards that connect directly to cloud databases. This page serves as a placeholder for my Looker Studio dashboard embeds.

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem;"}

::: {.glass-card}
### Global E-Commerce Performance
This interactive dashboard visualizes sales trends, regional performance, and product profitability.
*(Dashboard embed coming soon...)*
:::

:::
